text.title: AI Feature Build vs Buy vs Finetune Decision Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-feature-build-buy-finetune-decision methodology end-to-end.

step.name: spec-three-options
step.action: Specify build / buy / finetune options concretely — vendor, model, data, infra.

step.name: score-on-four-axes
step.action: Score each option 1-5 on cost, quality, control, time-to-market. Cite data, not vibes.

step.name: weight-by-risk-profile
step.action: Apply weights (regulated org weights control higher; startup weights TTM higher).

step.name: pick-and-document
step.action: Pick highest weighted score; document why losers lost.
step.decision-gate: If two options tie within 5%, write the trade-off explicitly + revisit-trigger criteria.

step.name: route-for-sign-off
step.action: Route to engineering lead + finance for sign-off.
